docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $225.94 FILED BY S AND C MOTORS INC AS TO DEFENDANT NEW JAPAN AUTO SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-16-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF JAN-05-1996 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
INVALID POS. AGENT FOR DEFT. NEW JAPAN AUTO SERVIC E NOT NAMED. POS NOT SIGNED BY SERVER.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-16-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-13-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NEW JAPAN AUTO SERVICE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S AND C MOTORS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW JAPAN AUTO SERVICE $225.94 PRINCIPAL, $62.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $288.44 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NEW JAPAN AUTO SERVICE
